since_last: 54% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.95%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 54% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.29% · BTC +0.67% · Gold +1.52% · Nasdaq100 +1.26%. 54% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.95%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.95%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.47%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: LRCX is the standout at +9.89%
cards.body: Leaders: LRCX +9.89%, ARM +9.76%, AMAT +9.72%, KLAC +9.38%, TER +8.17%. Laggards: AVAV -6.00%, SOUN -4.71%, PLTR -4.05%, IBM -3.17%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.79% at $149.47
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.79% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
